title: <div><tt>2. Core Mechanism of the Sign-World — how signification actually functi
content:
2. Core Mechanism of the Sign-World — how signification actually functions (or fails) under this doctrine.
3. "Subjects" — what passes for agency or consciousness (e.g., nomadic war-machines, barred subjects, catachrestic voices, etc.).
4. Everyday Existence — what it is to "live" when meaning is this violent.
5. One original poststructuralist notational system (8–15 symbols, operations, or gestures unique to this assassin — e.g., rhizomatic arrows, differend ligatures, chora pulses).
6. The Inevitable Catastrophe — the precise aporia or line of flight that causes this world to detonate or become-something-else.
7. Final text-act — 150–300 words written entirely within the doctrine (e.g., in pure différance, pure rhizome, pure jouissance) such that reading it performs the doctrine on the reader’s own language.

Word count: 1200–1600. Be vicious, erotic, unforgiving. Never grant the sign peace.

Poststructuralist Assassin for this query: [INSERT 1–10 HERE]
context: From document: You are a visionary designer tasked with creating the ultimate synthesis… — chunk 17 (chunk 17/18)
